qa_pairs.question: Which software stacks from Niagara and Mist will no longer be available on the Trillium cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The NiaEnv software stack, previously available on Niagara, and the MistEnv software stack, previously on Mist, will be retired and will not be available on Trillium or Trillium-gpu, respectively.

qa_pairs.question: What software stack will be used on the Trillium cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The Trillium cluster will utilize the CVMFS software stack, which is also available on other national clusters.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are loaded by default on the Trillium cluster, and how are other modules handled?
qa_pairs.answer: On the Trillium cluster, only the 'gentoo/2023' and 'CCconfig' modules will be loaded by default. All other modules, including those for compilers, libraries, and Python, will have to be explicitly loaded by the user.
